description: The TubeSpiralMesh component is a procedural Mesh that looks like a corkscrew often seen on the end of a wine bottle opener.

fields.Steps: How many length wise subdivisions the tube mesh has.
fields.MaximumDistanceBetweenRings: The distance allowed between each segment before the amount of steps are reduced.
fields.CoilCount: How many winds around the center the coil should have.
fields.ScaleCoilCountByLength: Whether the distance between coils stays consistent as the length grows by adding more coils.
fields.CoilPhase: How much to offset the coil starting angle.
fields.StartPoint: The center point position of what the Spiral is spiraling around at the beginning.
fields.StartTangent: The bend towards bias position of the Spiral at the beginning. Makes the Spiral sheer or warp towards this point at the beginning.
fields.EndPoint: The center point position of what the Spiral is spiraling around at the end.
fields.EndTangent: The bend towards bias position of the Spiral at the end. Makes the Spiral sheer or warp towards this point at the end. lerps from beginning.
fields.StartSpiralRadius: The distance from the center to the Spiral tube center at the beginning.
fields.EndSpiralRadius: The distance from the center to the Spiral tube center at the end.
fields.StartSpiralOrientation: The rotation of each segment ring at the start.
fields.EndSpiralOrientation: The rotation of each segment ring at the end. Lerps from start.
fields.Ends: How the ends should be sealed if at all on the corkscrew.
fields.Shading: The Shading of the screw geometry.
fields.StartTubeRadius: The radius of each segment at the start.
fields.EndTubeRadius: The radius of each segment at the end. Lerps from start.
fields.TubePoints: How many sides the tube has circumference wise on each segment.

usage: Attach to a slot and put into a MeshRenderer with a material to see what it looks like.
